steps.title: Salt from each mixture
steps.content:
Low‑salt mixture: 2% of x kg → $$0.02x$$ kg salt.
High‑salt mixture: 96% of y kg → $$0.96y$$ kg salt.

steps.title: Total salt required
steps.content:
Desired mixture: 24 kg at 4% salt → total salt needed = $$0.04 imes24$$ kg.
Set sum of contributions equal to required salt: $$0.02x+0.96y = 0.04 imes24$$.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
